controlNotes: The X32 has a fully parametric 4-band EQ plus HPF per channel. Access channel EQ by pressing the channel's SELECT button, then pressing the EQ button above the main display. Each band is fully parametric (Frequency, Gain, Q). Adjustments are made with the dedicated rotary encoders below the display.

instructionTemplates.selectChannel: Press the SELECT button on CH {channel} to select it
instructionTemplates.openEQ: Press the EQ button (top section of the main display area) to open the EQ screen
instructionTemplates.enableHPF: On the EQ screen, press the HPF enable button and set the frequency to {frequency}Hz using the encoder
instructionTemplates.setBandFrequency: Select {band} using the band selector buttons, then turn the FREQ encoder to {frequency}Hz
instructionTemplates.setBandGain: With {band} selected, turn the GAIN encoder to {amount}dB
instructionTemplates.saveSettings: Settings are saved automatically. Optionally store to a scene or channel preset.
